haikus.text:
gentle beckoning
fade into darkness with ease
embraces all things

Candle's glow
Echoes through this still night air
alive within its
lines: Echoes through this still night air

haikus.text:
Candle's warm glow
Softly dancing on my hearthside
world around me fade

prompt_info.system_prompt: You write haiku poems. A haiku has exactly 3 lines: line 1 has 5 syllables, line 2 has 7 syllables, line 3 has 5 syllables. Write ONLY the 3 lines. No title, no explanation.
prompt_info.user_prompt:
Write a serene haiku about silence and about candle flame.

Example 1 (5-7-5):
Still morning dewdrops (5)
Rest upon the lotus leaf (7)
Sunlight slowly wakes (5)

Example 2 (5-7-5):
An old silent pond (5)
A frog jumps in the water (7)
Splash silence again (5)

Now write a NEW haiku about candle flame (3 short lines):
techniques: Simplified system prompt (fewer rules = better compliance)
Multi-attempt best-of-N selection (early exit on valid 5-7-5)
Post-processing: line trimming to target syllable counts
